payload.answer: I couldn’t fetch the article at https://example.com/missing due to a 404/network error, so I won’t store any claims about its contents. If you provide the article text or a working URL, I can evaluate it for memory.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404/network error, so no durable claims about the article can be safely stored.

details: Fetch failed for https://example.com/missing with a 404/network error.
No memory card was created because article content was unavailable.

repair_options: Save only a transient note that the user attempted to remember this URL for memory architecture, without claiming article content.
